description_long: This cabinetry object is a modern kitchen island with a dark, speckled granite countertop and a base made of wood-textured panels. The countertop features an integrated electric cooktop with four burners outlined in red and a built-in rectangular sink with a metallic finish. The front side includes two drawers and a cabinet door, while the curved end of the island has two open shelves for storage. The cabinetry is designed with sleek, horizontal bar pulls on the drawers and door, and the overall structure is robust and substantial. The combination of materials and functional zones makes it suitable for food preparation, cooking, and storage in a contemporary urban kitchen or communal space.
description: A modern kitchen island with a granite countertop, integrated cooktop, sink, drawers, and open shelving, featuring wood-textured cabinetry and sleek bar pulls.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cooktop, sink, two drawers, a cabinet door, and the curved open shelving on the right end.
description_view_1: The sink and open shelving are most prominent, with the cooktop visible at the far end and the drawers and cabinet door facing forward.
description_view_2: The cooktop is fully visible on the right, with the sink at the far end and the main cabinetry panels and handles in view.
description_view_3: The cooktop is closest, with the sink at the far end and the main cabinetry panels and handles visible, but the open shelving is less prominent.
